subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Suriy-i-Qalam (Commentary on the Surih of the Pen)
subcodes.first_line: Praised be to God Who made the Point to be outstretched within the Book of Origination, an Ornament through which is the Genesis of Creativity
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعل النقطه البارزه فی کتاب الابداع طراز جداول الاختراع و فصل
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
